metadata.description: Zero-dependency security scanner for AI agent ecosystems

plugins.name: repo-forensics
plugins.description: Auto-scan repos, skills, MCP servers, and packages for security threats. 18 scanners, 19 correlation rules (incl. Lethal Trifecta), PostToolUse auto-scan hook, macOS Seatbelt sandbox for DAST. Detects prompt injection, supply chain attacks (127 version-pinned IOCs across 12 campaigns), credential theft, and 2026 attack patterns.
